## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? One paragraph. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / infrastructure

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `bun run lint` passes (zero warnings)
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] Tests added or explained why not needed
- [ ] If Tauri command signature changed: `bun run gen-bindings` run and `src/bindings.ts` committed
- [ ] Documentation updated in `docs-site/` for user-facing changes
- [ ] No secrets, personal paths, or internal-only references added

Closes #
